name: forest of enchantment
description: I'm in a forest of enchantment
hints: The enchanted forest surrounds the castle. Most directions loop back here. Only EAST leads back to the field.
The forest is enchanted - N, S, and W all loop. EAST is the only way out, back to the field by the castle.
You cannot chop or climb the trees normally. A spell might work on them. AT TREE casts a destructive spell but be warned - it can be fatal.
notes: The enchanted forest surrounding Claymorgue Castle. N/S/W all loop back here. Only EAST returns to the field (room 1). The trees are magical and resist chopping or climbing. Casting a spell AT TREE works but causes death - use with extreme caution.
